visual_description: A man in a dark suit and red tie stands in a dimly lit, rustic room. He looks down at a metal cage on the floor, then turns and walks toward the camera, his expression shifting from curiosity to a wide, unsettling smile. He raises his hand in a gesture that could be a wave or a beckoning motion.
audio_description: A loud, distorted rock song with heavy electric guitars and drums plays in the background.
